overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt trail through lush green hills. The character ascends from an enclosed vegetated path to an open hilltop vista overlooking distant mountains under bright afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt trail through grassy hills with dense bushes

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path surrounded by tall grass and bushes

entered.detail: winding dirt path with patches of grass and small rocks
sloped terrain covered in green grass and low shrubs
sloped terrain covered in green grass and low shrubs
scattered trees with green foliage lining the trail
dense green bushes flanking the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt trail through a lush green landscape. The path is flanked by dense bushes and grassy hillsides, with scattered deciduous trees visible ahead. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character navigates the gentle curves of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending trail with rocky outcrops and pine trees

events.description: screen briefly goes completely dark, likely passing through a shadow or brief transition

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing uphill along the trail, navigating slightly rockier terrain

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation beside the path
tall evergreen trees becoming visible along the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues ascending through the hills, with rocky outcrops appearing on the right side. After a brief dark occlusion, the path becomes slightly rockier as pine trees become visible in the distance. The dense bushes from the lower trail have fallen behind as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop trail with panoramic mountain vista

events.description: trail opens up to reveal expansive distant mountain range and valley below

agents.ego_description: Geralt reaches the hilltop and slows to look around at the panoramic vista of distant mountains and valleys

entered.detail: layered blue-gray mountains visible on the horizon
sweeping valley with distant settlements or structures visible below

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up to a wide panoramic vista as Geralt reaches the hilltop. Distant mountain ranges become visible across the horizon, with a sweeping valley view to the right. The vegetation becomes sparser, and the character pauses to look around at the expansive landscape before continuing along the ridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from an enclosed, lush trail into a wide-open mountain vista. It begins by following Geralt from behind as he navigates a winding dirt path flanked by dense bushes and grassy hillsides. As the trail climbs higher, the dense greenery gives way to rocky outcrops and distant pine trees, momentarily passing through a dark occlusion before the terrain becomes more rugged. The scene then opens into a sweeping panoramic view upon reaching the hilltop, where the vegetation thins and distant mountain ranges emerge across the horizon. Finally, the camera lingers on the expansive valley view to the right as the character pauses on the ridge to survey the landscape.
